examples: When I grew up, I too became a woodchopper, and after my father died I took care of my old mother as long as she lived.
When she heard Red Riding Hood's impassioned speech, Grandma jumped out of the Wolf's mouth, seized the woodchopper-person's ax, and cut his head off.
A fox who was escaping to evade the hunters happened to meet a woodchopper . It asked him for hiding out. The woodchopper admisted its request and let is hide in his house .
